chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD C.P No.D-3221 of 2022 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on MA No.12492/2022. 2. For orders on office objection. 3. For orders on MA No.12493/2022. 4. For orders on MA No.12494/2022. 5. For hearing of main case. 18-10-2022 Mr. Muhammad Sharif Sahito advocate for petitioner. By means of this petition, petitioner is seeking direction to Deputy Commissioner, Sanghar to stop construction of a road over his land. Neither he has submitted any proof of him being the land owner in any area of District Sanghar, nor the record of any construction of road. He has filed a copy of application addressed to SSP District Sanghar against private persons and police officers seeking protection. No case in such circumstances is made out justifying indulgence of the Court in the private affairs of the petitioner. Accordingly, petition is dismissed in limine along with listed applications. JUDGE JUDGE *Abdullah Channa/PS*
